response:
# MIT Overview

MIT, founded in 1861, stands as the #1 ranked university in the world with an enrollment of 11,500 students and an exceptionally competitive acceptance rate of just 3.9%. The institution boasts an impressive faculty of 1,069 members, including 98 Nobel laureates, supported by a substantial endowment of $24.6 billion. With an annual tuition of $57,590, MIT remains one of the most prestigious and well-resourced educational institutions globally.
